main-translation-explanation.forensically cultivate: Justifies 'le-abdah' as a legal duty of stewardship (Rule 19).
main-translation-explanation.vigilantly guard: Justifies 'le-shamrah' as a protective forensic mandate.

main-translation-explanation.certainly and forensically die: RULE 80 AUDIT: Rejected 'surely die'. Selected 'certainly and forensically' for 'mot tamut' to emphasize the judicial inevitability of the death penalty (Rule 32).
main-translation-explanation.Tree of the forensic Knowledge: Consistent rendering of the knowledge as a judicial/ethical domain.
